case_title: EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC. VS. CHUER ZHANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT (UNLAWFUL DETAINER-CODE CIVIL PROC., 585 (D)) FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZHANG, CHUER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT-ISSUE. $7,160.00 RENT, $470.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $625.00 COSTS, $8,709.43 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,964.43, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $2,649.25 INTEREST, $65.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, CHUER
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, CHUER

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZHANG, CHUER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 340 FREMONT STREET #103, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94105, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, CHUER
DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL LEASE AGREEMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC.
DECLARATION OF LOST OR OTHERWISE UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT, NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, CHUER
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $139.43 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, CHUER DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, CHUER
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, CHUER
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $625.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, CHUER
DECLARATION OF RICH HENRIQUEZ IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC. SERVED AUG-05-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, CHUER
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $235.39. FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY LI, LAURIE
